# VerdeScape Horti Solutions

> South India's integrated horticulture partner — 30+ years designing, building and maintaining sustainable landscapes for enterprises, institutions and homes.

VerdeScape offers landscape design, execution, project management, maintenance, horticulture consultancy and institutional advisory across corporate, residential, healthcare, hospitality, education and government sectors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of VerdeScape's practice, services and featured projects.
- [About](/about): Founder story, mission, vision and company timeline.
- [Services](/services): Six integrated services from design to long-term maintenance.
- [Industries](/industries): Sector-specific landscape solutions.
- [Projects](/projects): Portfolio of built work across sectors and geographies.
- [Sustainability](/sustainability): Water efficiency, native palettes and lifecycle thinking.
- [Insights](/insights): Articles on landscape trends, plant science and maintenance.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a consultation with the VerdeScape team.
